name: Apple Cake-Old Family Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix the eggs and vanilla extract until well combined.
3. Gradually add sugar to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Add the chopped apples, baking powder, baking soda, and salt to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
5. If using raisins, fold them into the batter (up to about 1/2 cup).
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13x3 inch pan.
7. Bake for approximately 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool before serving.
